resources.string: NofAR needs precise location to show which region you are in and to align horizon labels while exploring offline.
NofAR uses the camera as a live viewfinder for Explore mode labels. Images are not uploaded.
Internet is required only in Prepare mode to download OpenStreetMap and elevation data.
Location access is required to detect which region you are in and to align horizon labels.
Location was denied. Open Settings to grant precise location access for NofAR.
Enable location for region detection and horizon alignment.
Move your phone in a figure-8 pattern to calibrate the compass.
NofAR needs camera access to project terrain markers over the horizon.
Acquiring satellite lock… Ensure you have a clear view of the sky.
Device incompatible. This handset lacks the required magnetometer or rotation vector sensors.
Region data is missing or corrupted. Return to Home and re-download this region.
Partial region — elevation data incomplete; occlusion accuracy may be reduced.
Leaving data coverage zone for %1$s. Explore mode will suspend in %2$d seconds.
You have moved outside the downloaded boundary of %1$s.
No labeled features visible in this direction.
Download map data for your area
Explore-first experience with on-demand map downloads
Block map downloads on cellular data
Default language for place and peak names in new downloads
Language cannot be changed while a download is in progress.
